title: tragacantha casei
intro: Tragacantha casei, also known as Astragalus casei, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family that is native to the mountainous regions of China and the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its adaptogenic properties, which help the body to resist stress and promote overall well-being. The medicinal properties of Tragacantha casei include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Tragacantha casei include dried roots, capsules, and teas, which are commonly used to support respiratory health, enhance physical performance, and alleviate symptoms of fatigue and anxiety.
